tasks.label: Docker: Up (full stack)
tasks.detail: Builds and starts db, mailpit, vault, vault-init, api, worker, web. Web on :8080, API on :3000, Mailpit on :8025, Vault on :8200.

tasks.label: Docker: Down
tasks.detail: Stop the stack (keeps the DB volume).

tasks.label: Docker: Down + wipe volume
tasks.detail: Stop the stack and delete the DB volume (next up gets a fresh bootstrap key).

tasks.label: Docker: Logs — worker
tasks.detail: Stream logs from the worker container (Gateway sessions, sync, cron).

tasks.label: Docker: Logs — api
tasks.detail: Stream logs from the api container.

tasks.label: DB: Migrate (deploy)
tasks.detail: Apply pending migrations to the patrice DB.

tasks.label: DB: Reset (DROPS DATA → fresh bootstrap key)
tasks.detail: Wipe + re-migrate the patrice DB. Next API start prints a new bootstrap key.

tasks.label: API: Unit tests
tasks.detail: Run the Jest unit test suite.

tasks.label: API: e2e tests
tasks.detail: Run the e2e acceptance suite against the patrice_test DB.

tasks.label: API: Smoke check (health + bootstrap)
tasks.detail: Curl /health and /bootstrap on the running stack (:3000).
tasks.command: curl -s http://localhost:3000/health && echo '' && curl -s http://localhost:3000/bootstrap && echo ''

tasks.label: Integration: Smoke — KMS cipher round-trip
tasks.detail: Encrypts and decrypts a test token via the KMS adapter. Requires KMS_KEY_ID + AWS_REGION in api/.env and .aws/credentials populated.

tasks.label: Integration: Smoke — Vault cipher round-trip
tasks.detail: Encrypts and decrypts a test token via the Vault adapter. Requires the Docker stack running (Vault on :8200) and VAULT_ADDR=http://127.0.0.1:8200 etc. in api/.env.
